texts.full_text: lost their life savings and old-age pensions in the fiasco. Gaddis’ JR deals with the cycles of disruption and loss that are triggered by the ungrounded speculations at the center of the novel — but this is one aspect of the text Taylor never talks about. Taylor sharply criticizes the founding assumptions of mainstream economists and financiers: the ideas that the market is “rational,” and that it tends toward “equilibrium.” And here Taylor is unquestionably right: these founding assumptions — which still pervade mainstream economics in the US and around the world — are indeed nonsensical, as well as noxious. It’s only under ideal, frictionless conditions, that almost never exist in actuality, that Smith’s “invisible hand” actually does operate to create “optimal” outcomes. Marginalist and neoclassical/neoliberal economics is probably the most mystified discipline in the academy today, wedded as it is to the pseudo-rigor of mathematical models borrowed from physics, and deployed in circumstances where none of the idealizations at the basis of physics actually obtain. It’s welcome to see Taylor take on the economists’ “dream of a rationally ordered world” (301), one every bit as out of touch with reality, and as harmful in its effects when people tried to bend the real world to conform to it, as Soviet communism ever was. But alas — Taylor only dismisses the prevalent neoclassical version of the invisible hand, in order to welcome it back in another form. If the laws of economic equilibrium, borrowed by neoclassical economics from 19th-century physical dynamics, do not work, for Taylor this is because the economy is governed instead by the laws of complex systems, which he borrows from late-20th-century physics in the form of chaos and complexity theory. There is still an invisible hand in Taylor’s account: only now it works through phase transit

Here's a regex pattern that should accomplish what you're looking for: `\b(?<!\w)(\d{2})(?!\w)` Here's how it works: * `\b` matches a word boundary, ensuring that the two-digit number is not preceded or followed by a character. * `(?<!\w)` is a negative lookbehind assertion that checks if there is no word character (alphanumeric plus underscore) directly before the current position. This prevents matching numbers that are part of a larger word. `(?!\w)` is another negative lookahead assertion that checks if there is no word character directly after the current position. texts.full_text: LaFollette & Sinykin, Madison for the Wisconsin Newspaper Association and Wisconsin Freedom of Information Council. WILLIAM A. BABLITCH, J. Dennis W. Erickson, an Assistant District Attorney for St. Croix County (District Attorney), seeks review of a published decision of the court of appeals holding that public employee personnel records are exempted from the open records law. The court of appeals held in favor of Thomas J. Woźnicki by determining certain exemptions did not apply to his request for access under Wisconsin's Open Records Law (WIS. STAT. § 19). Erickson, representing St. Croix County District Attorney’s office as an Assistant DA, argued that personnel records should remain confidential and exempt from public disclosure. The court of appeals concluded that the statutory language provided limited grounds on which such exemptions could be justified without a compelling state interest demonstrating harm or invasion of privacy if disclosed. The decision underscored balancing transparency in government operations with protecting individual rights within those entities. Erickson's petition for review by Wisconsin’s Supreme Court was driven by concerns over potential precedents affecting the confidentiality and protection typically afforded to personnel records, especially considering sensitive information contained therein. The case raised important questions about public access versus privacy protections under state law—highlighting ongoing debates in jurisdictions across the United States

texts.full_text: he grassroots Fighting Game Community, such decisions almost always fall on the shoulders of community members, who must not only invest their time but also their money in hopes of building something that resonates with fans. As such, content creators like JakoMan face incentives to follow the crowds. Yet the FGC is nothing if not loyal, and JakoMan is no different. A “character specialist,” he proved his allegiance to the Marvel series when Marvel vs. Capcom: Infinite stumbled out of the gates and the series was dropped from the Evolution Championship Series lineup. Despite all of the negativity surrounding Infinite, he decided to keep the series as the centerpiece of his channel. The decision paid off. Even after three years, “I get a lot of messages and emails from everyone [saying] that I keep the community and the scene alive. It means a lot to me that I get a lot of support and love from everyone who watches my videos and gameplay on my Youtube.” The fact that his viewers rewarded him for sticking with his favorite series is a point of gratitude and pride for him, and he swears he’ll “keep on supporting the [Marvel] community until the day that I retire!” To see for yourself what makes JakoMan such a diehard Marvel supporter, follow him on YouTube and Twitter. Then, to catch one of his favorite games in action, check out Clash of the Stones, Untamed Gaming’s online Marvel vs. Capcom: Infinite tournament series. The next event will take place this Saturday, August 22, at 7pm eastern time on the Untamed Gaming Twitch channel. Just be for how alive and energetic this game really is. UK national epidemiological study in which personality status was measured using the screening version of the Structured Clinical Interview for DSM-IV Personality Disorders (SCID-II) and reclassified to five levels using a modified severity index. Associations between levels of severity of personality pathology and social, demographic and clinical variables were measured. Of 8391 individuals interviewed and their personality status assessed, only a minority (n = 1933, 23%) had no personality pathology. The results supported the hypothesis. texts.full_text: epts, it is 100% clear that the following are some key features introduced in Oracle Database 12c Release 1 (12c R1): ### Multitenant Architecture - Container Databases (CDBs) & Pluggable Databases (PDBs): - The multitenant architecture allows a single container database to host multiple pluggable databases. This enables efficient management of resources and easier consolidation. - Benefits: - Simplified administration, as you can manage all PDBs within the CDB from one point in place rather than having separate instances for each application or environment. ### Improved SQL Performance - SQL Plan Management (SPM): - SPM ensures consistent performance by controlling and managing execution plans. It prevents suboptimal query plan changes that can degrade database performance. - Adaptive Execution Plans: - Oracle Database automatically adjusts the runtime statistics of queries to optimize their execution. ### In-Memory Capabilities - Oracle TimesTen in-memory option: - Provides a high-performance, shared-nothing architecture for real-time applications by leveraging memory as its primary storage medium. - In-Memory Column Store: - Allows data stored within the database buffer cache to be accessed directly from main memory without having to read it back into disk I/O operations. ### Enhanced Security Features - Virtual Private Database (VPD): - Provides fine-grained access control by appending a dynamic WHERE

texts.full_text: hereinafter referred to by the name ‘Docalvolne’. The new Calibrachoa plant is a product of a planned breeding program conducted by the Inventor in Rheinberg, Germany. The objective of the breeding program is to create new compact and early-flowering and vigorous Calibrachoa plants with large attractive flowersthat are suitable for both indoor and outdoor cultivation. The breeding program involved crossing parent plants with desirable traits and selecting offspring that exhibited the most favorable characteristics. The resulting ‘Docalvolne’ cultivar is characterized by its unique combination of features, including: 1. Compact Growth Habit: 'Docalvolne' is a bushy plant with a controlled growth habit, making it ideal for container gardening and hanging baskets. It typically reaches a height of 20-30 cm and a spread of 30-40 cm. 2. Early Flowering: This cultivar begins to flower early in the season, usually within 10-12 weeks after sowing. The flowers are produced continuously throughout the growing season, providing a long period of color. 3. Vigorous Growth: 'Docalvolne' displays strong and healthy growth, with good resistance to common pests and diseases. This makes it a low-maintenance plant that is easy to care for. 4. texts.full_text: on my resignation, I bump into a friend at a yoga class. A woman from my high school graduating class. She hugs me and asks how work is going. “Is it still overwhelming?” I pause to create space, to stuff down the truth. I dig into my teenage toolkit. I say something vague and non-committal, then do my best to change the subject, right away. “Phew, that was a close one.” Later, alone in my apartment, I relive the conversation with the integrity I should have brought tO it the first time. The courage to answer honestly, without expectation of how she will respond. To set aside old hurt. To stand in my decision. To know it’s right. texts.full_text: I have a few suggestions that might help you resolve the issue with APK expansion files: 1. Check Resource URL: Ensure that your main `.apk` file is correctly linked to its corresponding OBB (Opaque Binary Blob) or ZIP resource in Google Play Console under "App Content". Double-check both URLs for accuracy. 2. Verify Upload Status: Confirm on the Google Play Developer console whether all files have been successfully uploaded and are marked as available. 3. Check File Names & Paths: - The main APK should reference your expansion file correctly. - Ensure that OBB/ZIP filenames match exactly what is specified in your manifest or resource loader code, including case sensitivity (e.g., `main.com.example.mygame.expansion`). 4. Correct Resource Type: Verify you are using the correct type of expansion files for your app's architecture and target device specifications. 5. Clear Cache/Data: - On the test devices, clear cache/data related to Google Play Store or try a different network. 6. Network Issues: Make sure there is no issue with internet connectivity on either end (device/network). 7. Device Compatibility: Ensure that your testing device supports OBB files and meets any other requirements specified for expansion file downloads. 8. Re-upload Resources: - Sometimes, re-uploading the resource can resolve issues if something went wrong during initial upload. 9. Check Google Play Console Settings: Verify there are no restrictions or settings in place

texts.full_text: vice is operating properly before starting to perform necessary medical activities. In the context of an emergency care situation where every second counts for patient safety and recovery—such as in a cardiac arrest scenario or during advanced life support procedures, these requirements become even more critical. To meet such needs effectively while ensuring reliability under pressure is often challenging due to several factors. Firstly, the device must be able to quickly transition from an off state into full operational capacity without any significant delays that could compromise patient outcomes in a time-sensitive situation like emergency care or during life-threatening events where immediate intervention can mean survival. Secondarily and perhaps more importantly for user confidence—especially given such devices are often used by individuals who may not be medical professionals themselves, the device should provide clear feedback to indicate its operational status. This could include visual signals (like LED lights), auditory cues or even tactile responses that reassure users of proper functionality before they proceed with critical actions. In addition to these immediate requirements after powering on a life-critical emergency care equipment like defibrillators, monitors and ventilator devices must also adhere stringent standards for reliability. This is because the device's performance in an actual medical event can have profound implications not just operationally but ethically as well—since it directly impacts patient safety. Moreover these systems should ideally be designed to minimize user error which could arise due various factors like stress, fatigue or unfamiliarity with equipment during high-pressure situations. User interfaces that are intuitive and responsive play a significant role in this context by reducing the cognitive load on users thereby allowing them focus more effectively their attention towards patient care. The presence of drusen and pigmentary changes were more frequent in patients with the risk genotype (OR=2.05 and OR=2.27 respectively). These findings suggest that cFH Y402H not only influences susceptibility to AMD but also affects early phenotypic features, potentially providing a basis for personalized medicine approaches. In conclusion, this study provides evidence that the CFH Y402H polymorphism is associated with earlier onset and specific early phenotypic features of age-related macular degeneration. These findings support the idea that genetic factors can influence not only the susceptibility to a disease but also its clinical presentation. UnderstanDing these associations can be crucial for developing personalized medicine strategies, where treatment and monitoring protocols are tailored to individual genetic profiles. Further research is needed to confirm these findings and to explore the potential of CFH Y402H as a biomarker for early intervention

BlackBerry hasn't released any solid sales figures yet, but others have testified that the Q10 is a failure. For instance, an anonymous Canadian carrier said that the Q10 was supposed to be a hit for BlackBerry, but that the phone "hit the ground and died" also noted by other sources in the industry who have observed weak sales performance of the device. The slow adoption may also stem from the fact that there are more affordable touchscreen alternatives available on the market, which could be attracting cost-conscious customers away from the Q10. Moreover, BlackBerry's decision to delay key features like BBM for iOS and Android has not helped in boosting sales either; instead, it might have further alienated potential users who were looking forward to these cross-platform messaging capabilities. In response to this disappointing performance of its flagship device, BlackBerry is reportedly considering various measures to improve the situation. One such measure could be a price cut for both new and recently purchased Q10 devices as an attempt to stimulate sales volume. Additionally, it may expedite work on future updates or software enhancements aimed at improving user experience with the QWERTY-equipped smartphone. Our shower seat was developed to provide people with limited mobility a possibility to shower while sitting on the soft comfortable seat. For additional balance support, optional arm supports and a backrest are available. A flexible and durable aid for the bathroom Our shower seat is a flexible and stable aid for users who need to shower sitting down, and may be used in all kinds of bathrooms. The foldable seat and optional arm supports can be folded into a vertical position when not in use to free up space in bathrooms with limited space. Height adjustment is an option for our shower seats. The height is easily adjusted up to 5″ with the button that is located on the wall above the seat. The shower seat is tested and approved according to the relevant standards, including DS/EN 17966:2016, the standard for assistive products for personal hygiene.
